title: Rental Agreement (Basic)
description: A simple residential rental agreement template.

title: Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA)
description: A mutual NDA for confidential information sharing.
body:
NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT (MUTUAL)

This NDA is entered into on {{effective_date}} between {{party_a}} and {{party_b}}.

1) Confidential Information: Any non-public information disclosed by either party.
2) Obligations: Each party agrees to protect confidential information and use it only for the permitted purpose.
3) Term: {{term_years}} years from the effective date.

This is a general template. Consider tailoring to Egyptian legal requirements and consulting a lawyer for high-stakes agreements.

title: Employment Offer Letter (Basic)
description: A basic employment offer letter template.
body:
EMPLOYMENT OFFER LETTER

Dear {{employee_name}},

{{employer_name}} is pleased to offer you the position of {{job_title}} starting on {{start_date}}.

Compensation: {{salary}} EGP per month (subject to applicable taxes/insurance).

This letter is a template and does not replace a full employment contract. Terms should comply with applicable Egyptian labor laws.
